mapper.select: with ranked_history as ( select h.account_id, h.platform_id, h.current_balance, h.create_time, row_number() over (partition by h.account_id order by h.create_time asc, h.id asc) as first_rank, row_number() over (partition by h.account_id order by h.create_time desc, h.id desc) as last_rank from account_balance_history h where h.create_time >= #{startTime} and h.create_time < #{endTime} ), first_history as ( select account_id, platform_id, current_balance, create_time from ranked_history where first_rank = 1 ), last_history as ( select account_id, platform_id, current_balance, create_time from ranked_history where last_rank = 1 ) select cast(#{startTime} as date) as summary_date, p.id as platform_id, p.name as platform_name, a.id as account_id, a.username as username, f.current_balance as start_balance, l.current_balance as end_balance, (f.current_balance - l.current_balance) as platform_consume_amount, ((f.current_balance - l.current_balance) * case when p.received_amount is null or p.received_amount <= 0 then 1 else p.recharge_amount / p.received_amount end ) as actual_consume_amount, f.create_time as first_balance_time, l.create_time as last_balance_time from first_history f join last_history l on l.account_id = f.account_id join accounts a on a.id = f.account_id join platform p on p.id = f.platform_id order by p.id asc, a.id asc
mapper.insert:
insert into daily_account_consume_summary (summary_date, platform_id, platform_name, account_id, username, start_balance, end_balance, platform_consume_amount, actual_consume_amount, first_balance_time, last_balance_time, create_time, update_time) values
(#{row.summaryDate}, #{row.platformId}, #{row.platformName}, #{row.accountId}, #{row.username}, #{row.startBalance}, #{row.endBalance}, #{row.platformConsumeAmount}, #{row.actualConsumeAmount}, #{row.firstBalanceTime}, #{row.lastBalanceTime}, now(), now())
on conflict (summary_date, account_id) do update set platform_id = excluded.platform_id, platform_name = excluded.platform_name, username = excluded.username, start_balance = excluded.start_balance, end_balance = excluded.end_balance, platform_consume_amount = excluded.platform_consume_amount, actual_consume_amount = excluded.actual_consume_amount, first_balance_time = excluded.first_balance_time, last_balance_time = excluded.last_balance_time, update_time = now()
